guidance.en: Enter your full legal name. You are the person responding to the motion filed by the other party.
guidance.es: Ingrese su nombre legal completo. Usted es la persona que responde a la moción.

guidance.en: Enter the full legal name of the person who filed the Request for Order (FL-300).

fields.field_label: Do you agree or disagree with the requests?

guidance.en: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose. You must state specific facts supporting your position.
guidance.es: Marque las casillas indicando con cuáles solicitudes está de acuerdo y cuáles se opone.
guidance.zh: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.vi: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.so: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.ti: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.am: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.ar: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.ht: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.ko: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.pt: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.ru: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.
guidance.tl: Check the boxes indicating which requests you agree with and which you oppose.

guidance.en: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details. Avoid opinions — courts rely on facts.
guidance.es: Indique hechos específicos que respalden su posición. Incluya fechas, nombres y detalles.
guidance.zh: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.vi: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.so: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.ti: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.am: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.

guidance.ht: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.ko: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.pt: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.ru: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.
guidance.tl: State specific facts that support your position. Include dates, names, and details.

common_errors.en: Stating opinions without supporting facts. The court needs evidence, not feelings.

tips.en: Organize by topic. Address each request made by the other party separately.

guidance.en: If the other party requested changes to custody or visitation, explain your position and what arrangement serves the child's best interest.
guidance.es: Si la otra parte solicitó cambios en la custodia o visitación, explique su posición.

guidance.en: If the other party requested child or spousal support changes, state your position on the amount and provide income information.
guidance.es: Si la otra parte solicitó cambios en la manutención, indique su posición sobre el monto.

guidance.en: This is your sworn statement. Everything you write here must be true and based on your personal knowledge. False statements are punishable as perjury under Penal Code § 118.
guidance.es: Esta es su declaración jurada. Todo lo que escriba aquí debe ser verdadero.
